title: Partnership; partners
doc_html:
Art. 737.  Partnership; partners

A partnership has the procedural capacity to be sued in its partnership name.

The partners of an existing partnership may not be sued on a partnership obligation unless the partnership is joined as a defendant.
doc_text:
Art. 737.  Partnership; partners
A partnership has the procedural capacity to be sued in its partnership name.
The partners of an existing partnership may not be sued on a partnership obligation unless the partnership is joined as a defendant.
